title: Quality Engineer, Senior
unit: NAU Radiant Center for Remote Sensing
summary: Support engineering activities across the full lifecycle of flight and ground systems for multiple currently funded NASA projects. This position focuses on quality engineering, mission assurance and compliance, and systems engineering, with significant responsibility for technical execution and cross-disciplinary coordination, and also provides as-needed support in electrical and software engineering areas. Posted as Quality Engineer, Senior (working title); the NAU system title is Instrument Engineer, Senior. Eligible for on-site, hybrid, or remote work.
highlights: Oversee and implement quality engineering activities spanning multiple engineering domains (systems, electrical, software, mechanical, and SMA), including requirements development, allocation, verification, and compliance validation.

Lead verification and validation (V&V) planning and execution, including analytical modeling, system-level analysis, and test/inspection strategy development, and review/approve assembly, integration, and test procedures.

Oversee procurement, fabrication, integration, and test activities to ensure conformance to engineering designs and applicable standards, applying quality engineering and risk management practices throughout the project lifecycle.
